caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt that reads "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" is speaking into a professional black microphone. He is in a room with walls decorated with numerous framed photographs and a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt in the background. To the right of the mannequin, a clothing rack holds various garments. In the lower corners of the scene, logos are visible, including one that says "DRE" and another that reads "DRE'S FLY FIT." Across the sequence, the man's facial expressions change as he talks, moving from a neutral look to one of surprise or emphasis with an open mouth. He also uses a hand gesture, lifting his hand to emphasize a point during his speech. The camera remains static, capturing his upper body from the chest up.
